positive: A minimalist, intricate geometric representation of a soaring mythical griffin combined with bioluminescent cyberpunk flora. The griffin should have clean, sharp edges and a stylized, tribal-inspired silhouette, rendered in deep indigo, teal, and electric coral accents. The flora elements should spiral outward, forming a halo of abstract pattern around the central figure. Highly contrasting composition with strong negative space and clean vector lines. Art Deco inspired fusion with Synthwave aesthetics. Clean silhouette suitable for apparel printing, flat lay style, high contrast, symmetry, graphic novel style, vector art, detailed linework, --ar 1:1
negative: photorealistic, messy, blurry, smudge, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, faded, grayscale
